body.title: CLOSED: COA object wrap — extract NE+TWM state from main.py into coa.py
body.result: Created cognition/coa.py with COA class. Extracted NE state + _run_ne_background() → COA.tick(). Property shims on Igor preserve all call sites. 4508/4509 tests pass (1 excluded: pre-existing port-conflict flake). Commit 7557a93b.
body.description:
Create cognition/coa.py with a COA class that holds NE instance state extracted from main.py. Use @property shims on Igor so existing call sites are untouched (single-COA behavior unchanged).

State to move from Igor.__init__ to COA.__init__:
- self.ne (NarrativeEngine)
- self._ne_thread
- self._ne_spawn_lock
- self._ne_last_twm_fingerprint
- self._ne_last_run_time
- self._last_ne_valence

Move _run_ne_background() → COA.tick(). _experiment_scheduler stays on Igor; COA.tick() calls back via Igor reference. _run_ne_deep_consolidation stays on Igor.

main.py: self._coa = COA(self.cortex, instance_id, igor=self); Igor exposes property shims for backwards-compat (self.ne → self._coa.ne, etc.). Call site in main loop becomes self._coa.tick().

No changes to narrative_engine.py, twm.py, or milieu.py in this step — wrap only.

HIGH-inertia pre-approval: Akien stamped 2026-05-07 for main.py, narrative_engine.py, twm.py, milieu.py — covers this child.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/cognition/coa.py (new), wild_igor/igor/main.py (extract state + add shims + call COA.tick())
**Design rules:** docs-in-code (coa.py docstring required), no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** IN — COA class, state move, property shims, main loop delegation. OUT — spawn primitive, CPU gate, milieu intra-box, multi-COA tests. narrative_engine.py and twm.py must be UNTOUCHED.
**Test plan:** existing pytest tests/ -x -q pass unchanged after refactor. No new tests needed — behavioral no-op is the proof.
